meta.source: Puducherry Transport Department (transport.py.gov.in) & Motor Vehicles Act 1988 (amended 2019)

learner_license.title: Learner's License (LLR)
learner_license.age_requirement: 16 years for motorcycle without gear (with parental consent if under 18); 18 years for other vehicles; 20 years for transport vehicles
documents_required: Age proof (birth certificate / school certificate / passport)
Medical Certificate Form 1A (if applying for transport vehicle or age 50+)
process: Step 2: Select State 'Pondicherry' and your RTO jurisdiction
Step 3: Click Online Services > Sarathi Services > Apply Online > New Learner's Licence
Step 4: Fill application details as per original records
Step 5: Pay the prescribed fees online
Step 6: Verify payment status and print receipt
Step 7: Book slot for LL Test
Step 8: Appear for computer-based test (10 objective questions, 6 correct to pass)
Step 9: If passed, LLR is printed immediately
Step 10: If failed, re-test available after fee payment
notes: After 30 days of obtaining LLR, you can apply for permanent Driving License
LLR is valid for 6 months - apply for DL before expiry
Preliminary test exempted if already holding LLR or permanent license

driving_license.title: Driving License (DL)

types.fresh: New Driving License (after holding LLR for 30+ days)
types.additional_endorsement: Additional Endorsement (AEDL) for new vehicle class

documents_required_fresh: Medical Certificate Form 1 (under 40) or Form 1A (40 and above)
documents_required_renewal: Medical Certificate Form 1A (mandatory if age 40 or above)
renewal_process: Step 2: Click Online Services > DL Services > Renewal of DL
Step 3: Enter DL number and date of birth
Step 5: Upload Medical Certificate Form 1A (if age 40+)
Step 8: Report to camera room for biometric capture
Step 9: DL is renewed and sent to your address

renewal_fees.with_test: Additional Rs. 50 per class of vehicle (if expired more than 1 year)

medical_certificate_rules.form_1: Self-declaration of fitness (for applicants under 40, non-transport vehicles)
medical_certificate_rules.form_1A: Medical certificate from registered MBBS doctor (mandatory for: age 40+, transport vehicles, renewal after long expiry)
medical_certificate_rules.form_1A_checks: Vision test, general physical control, medical history review

important_notes: Age 40+ renewal REQUIRES Form 1A medical certificate - no exceptions
Form 1 (self-declaration) is NOT accepted for age 40+ applicants
If DL expired more than 1 year, you need valid LLR and re-test
DL test: vehicle must have 'L' board, applicant must wear helmet
Result is informed on the spot

vehicle_registration.title: Vehicle Registration
documents_required: Certificate confirming residence (Election Photo ID / Passport)
Form 60 (for three/four wheelers) or PAN Card copy
process: Step 1: Dealer submits application online through VAHAN 4.0
Step 2: Pay registration fees and road tax online
Step 3: Vehicle inspection at RTO (if required)
Step 4: RC book issued and can be collected after 10 days

fees.motorcycle: Rs. 670 (Rs. 300 + Rs. 200 smart card + Rs. 170 service)

vehicle_registration.rc_validity: 15 years for private vehicles, 5 years for transport vehicles

rc_renewal.title: RC (Registration Certificate) Renewal
rc_renewal.when_required: After 15 years for private vehicles, after 5 years for transport vehicles

fees.motorcycle: Rs. 600 (Rs. 300 + Rs. 200 smart card + Rs. 100 service)

challan.title: Traffic Challans and Penalties

drunk_driving.fine: Rs. 10,000 and/or 6 months jail first, Rs. 15,000 and/or 2 years jail repeat

check_challan_online: Enter vehicle number or challan number
payment_methods: Online: Parivahan portal, Puducherry Police website, UPI, debit card, net banking
Offline: Traffic police counters, RTO-authorized offices
non_payment_consequences: Cannot sell vehicle or renew insurance/fitness

appointment_booking.title: RTO Appointment Booking
how_to_book: Step 3: Choose available date and time slot
Step 4: Confirm booking and print receipt

fee_calculator.title: Fee Calculator
fee_calculator.description: Use the Fee Calculator on our portal to estimate costs for any RTO service
fee_calculator.note: Fees may vary. Final amount shown during online application on Parivahan portal.

noc.title: NOC for Taking Vehicle Outside Puducherry
documents_required: Form 28 (in triplicate, quadruplicate if HP endorsed)

fitness_certificate.title: Fitness Certificate
fitness_certificate.applicable_to: Transport vehicles (mandatory); non-transport vehicles (optional after 15 years)
fitness_certificate.validity: As prescribed by RTO (usually 6 months for transport vehicles)

offices.name: RTO Puducherry
offices.address: No. 1, Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel Salai, Puducherry - 605001

general_info.title: General RTO Information

online_portals.vahan: https://vahan.parivahan.gov.in - For all vehicle registration services
online_portals.echallan: https://echallan.parivahan.gov.in - For checking and paying traffic challans
online_portals.transport_dept: https://transport.py.gov.in - Puducherry Transport Department official website

key_rules: Driving license is mandatory for operating any motor vehicle on public roads
Vehicle registration is mandatory before plying on public roads
Valid insurance is mandatory for all vehicles
Age 40+ license renewal requires Form 1A medical certificate
All applications can be made online through Parivahan portal
Biometric capture required at RTO office for most services
documents_always_carry: Aadhaar Card or other ID proof
